function.name: get_context
function.description: Loads the customer profile and ranked menu before making recommendations. Must be called at the start of every call. The phone_number is automatically extracted from the Vapi webhook body at the backend — pass an empty string if you don't know it.

phone_number.description: The caller's phone number. Pass empty string — backend reads it from the webhook body automatically.

request.description: What the customer said they want, in their own words. Used to score and rank menu items. Example: 'something warm and not too sweet, no dairy'.

function.name: save_order
function.description: Saves a confirmed order after the customer has agreed to all items and modifications. Call this only once per call, after full order confirmation. Returns a pickup time.

items.description: List of ordered items as plain strings. Include modifications inline. Example: ['Oat Milk Latte (less sweet)', 'Chai Latte (oat milk, extra spicy)'].

customer_name.description: The customer's first name or 'there' if unknown. Used to call out the order at pickup.

total.description: Optional. Total price in dollars. Omit if unsure — backend will calculate.
